runs.note: Fixed security headers after NGINX decommission: set X-Frame-Options to DENY, added missing HSTS/XCTO/Referrer-Policy/Permissions-Policy headers, set Cache-Control no-store for authenticated responses, and fixed getTrustedClientIP to only trust X-Forwarded-For from Cloudflare IPs
